params.signatures: A signature for the sponsor and the allocator. abi.encode(bytes(sponsorSignature), bytes(allocatorData))
params.solveParams: List of solve parameters for when the outputs were filled

params.orderOwnerSignature: Signature from the order owner authorizing this external call

params.solveParams: List of solve parameters for when the outputs were filled element

params.expiryTimestamp: Set to ensure if your transaction does not mine quickly, you don't end up purchasing an order that you can not prove OR is outside the timeToBuy window.
